title: Soro: A Lightweight Foundation Model and Chatbot for Tajik
author: arXiv cs.AI
summary: The paper introduces Soro, a lightweight foundation model and chatbot specifically designed for the Tajik language, addressing the lack of NLP resources for low-resource languages. It aims to provide conversational AI capabilities in Tajik while remaining efficient. This work contributes to inclusive language technology and could serve as a baseline for further research in similar under-served languages.
